title: REMA 1000 — Security Operations (NOC Wall)
description: Live SOC overview for the NOC wall display. Severity buckets, geographic origin, top attackers, MITRE ATTACK pattern, and high-severity event feed.

options.query: | makeresults count=60 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-".(60-i)."m") | eval critical_events = max(0, round(15 + 4*sin(i/8) + 2*sin(i/3))) | sort _time | table _time critical_events

| makeresults count=60 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-".(60-i)."m") | eval high_events = max(0, round(40 + 8*sin(i/6) + 4*sin(i/2))) | sort _time | table _time high_events

| makeresults count=60 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-".(60-i)."m") | eval medium_events = max(0, round(105 + 12*sin(i/7) + 5*cos(i/3))) | sort _time | table _time medium_events

| makeresults count=60 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-".(60-i)."m") | eval low_events = max(0, round(870 + 30*sin(i/9) + 10*sin(i/4))) | sort _time | table _time low_events

| makeresults count=60 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-".(60-i)."m") | eval total_events = max(0, round(1030 + 50*sin(i/8) + 15*cos(i/3))) | sort _time | table _time total_events

| makeresults | eval lat=59.9, lon=10.7, city="Oslo", events=145, country="Norway" | append [| makeresults | eval lat=60.39, lon=5.32, city="Bergen", events=89, country="Norway"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=63.43, lon=10.39, city="Trondheim", events=62, country="Norway"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=58.97, lon=5.73, city="Stavanger", events=45, country="Norway"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=39.9, lon=116.4, city="Beijing", events=187, country="China"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=55.75, lon=37.62, city="Moscow", events=156, country="Russia"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=52.52, lon=13.40, city="Berlin", events=23, country="Germany"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=51.51, lon=-0.13, city="London", events=68, country="United Kingdom"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=40.71, lon=-74.0, city="New York", events=94, country="United States"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=22.32, lon=114.17, city="Hong Kong", events=121, country="China"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=43.65, lon=-79.38, city="Toronto", events=37, country="Canada"] | append [| makeresults | eval lat=-23.55, lon=-46.63, city="Sao Paulo", events=52, country="Brazil"] | table lat lon city events country

| makeresults | eval src_ip="195.211.4.18", attacks=324 | append [| makeresults | eval src_ip="202.108.7.99", attacks=287] | append [| makeresults | eval src_ip="103.24.155.40", attacks=201] | append [| makeresults | eval src_ip="88.221.93.16", attacks=142] | append [| makeresults | eval src_ip="45.142.122.71", attacks=98] | append [| makeresults | eval src_ip="176.55.31.207", attacks=76] | append [| makeresults | eval src_ip="217.144.10.85", attacks=54] | sort - attacks | table src_ip attacks

| makeresults | eval tactic="Initial Access", technique="T1078", attempts=45 | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Initial Access", technique="T1133", attempts=23] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Initial Access", technique="T1190", attempts=18] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Execution", technique="T1059", attempts=67] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Execution", technique="T1204", attempts=12] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Persistence", technique="T1098", attempts=8] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Persistence", technique="T1136", attempts=15] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Credential Access", technique="T1110", attempts=89] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Credential Access", technique="T1003", attempts=34] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Lateral Movement", technique="T1021", attempts=22] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Impact", technique="T1486", attempts=4] | append [| makeresults | eval tactic="Impact", technique="T1490", attempts=2] | table tactic technique attempts

| makeresults count=12 | streamstats count as i | eval _time = relative_time(now(), "-".(i*7)."s") | eval severity = case(i==1, "CRIT", i==2, "HIGH", i==3, "HIGH", i==4, "MED", i==5, "MED", i==6, "HIGH", i==7, "MED", i==8, "CRIT", i==9, "MED", i==10, "HIGH", i==11, "MED", true(), "MED") | eval host = case(i==1, "payroll-svc-3", i==2, "bastion-eu-1", i==3, "payroll-svc", i==4, "store-1247-pos", i==5, "store-0884-pos", i==6, "vpn-gw-no-1", i==7, "store-2048-pos", i==8, "backup-srv-2", i==9, "store-0451-pos", i==10, "bastion-no-2", i==11, "store-1893-pos", true(), "store-0322-pos") | eval mitre = case(i==1, "T1486", i==2, "T1110", i==3, "T1078", i==4, "T1133", i==5, "T1059", i==6, "T1190", i==7, "T1059", i==8, "T1490", i==9, "T1204", i==10, "T1110", i==11, "T1133", true(), "T1059") | eval description = case(i==1, "Data Encrypted for Impact", i==2, "Brute Force", i==3, "Valid Accounts", i==4, "External Remote Services", i==5, "Command and Scripting Interpreter", i==6, "Exploit Public-Facing Application", i==7, "Command and Scripting Interpreter", i==8, "Inhibit System Recovery", i==9, "User Execution", i==10, "Brute Force", i==11, "External Remote Services", true(), "Command and Scripting Interpreter") | eval _raw = severity . "  " . strftime(_time, "%H:%M:%S") . "  " . host . "  " . mitre . "  " . description | sort - _time | table _time _raw severity host mitre description
